+ void WaveX::Comm::Spi_ValidateBuffers(void)
+ {
+     // Basic buffer validation - check for obvious issues
+     if (queue_head >= MAX_QUEUED_MESSAGES || queue_tail >= MAX_QUEUED_MESSAGES) {
+         if (s_hw) s_hw->PrintLine("DAISY: SPI queue head/tail out of bounds");
+     }
+     if (queue_count > MAX_QUEUED_MESSAGES) {
+         if (s_hw) s_hw->PrintLine("DAISY: SPI queue count exceeds maximum");
+     }
+ }
+ 
+ void WaveX::Comm::Spi_ForceReset(void)
+ {
+     // Reset all queues and state
+     queue_head = queue_tail = queue_count = 0;
+     outgoing_head = outgoing_tail = outgoing_count = 0;
+     memset(&s_stats, 0, sizeof(s_stats));
+     if (s_hw) s_hw->PrintLine("DAISY: SPI link force reset");
+ }
